subcodes.first_line: The Sun of eternity hath dawned from the brow of Glory. Blessed be he who is illumined by its effulgent rays. The holy Countenance hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد طلعت شمس البقاء عن جبین البهاء طوبی لمن استشرق باشراقاها قد ظهرت طلعة القدس
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
